agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and hydrophobic substitutions at pos

report.hypothesis: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and hydrophobic substitutions at position 11 will enhance SSTR2-specific interactions in the ECL2/TM5 pocket while reducing off-target binding to SSTR3/SSTR5. This will increase the selectivity margin by improving SSTR2 complementarity and disrupting off-target electrostatic/steric interactions.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current design strategy is effective in generating SSTR2 binders, but the se

report.hypothesis: The current design strategy is effective in generating SSTR2 binders, but the selectivity margin is at risk of decreasing. Targeted mutations at non-pharmacophore positions are necessary to maintain or improve Δmargin and ensure long-term success.

proposed_changes.rationale: To disrupt conserved pocket contacts in SSTR3/SSTR5 while preserving pharmacophore positions 7-10 and Cys3/Cys14.
Introduce mutations at non-pharmacophore positions to disrupt conserved interactions in SSTR3/SSTR5 without affecting the core pharmacophore (FWKT) or cysteine residues.
